programme.title: Jingle Belle
programme.desc: (G) A successful jingle writer is cajoled into returning to her hometown to write a song for the 50th anniversary of the annual Christmas Eve concert.

programme.title: Love At First Like
programme.desc: (PG) A cynical journalist is assigned to cover a handsome celebrity who offers dating advice for women, and ends up finding there's more than meets the eye.

programme.title: Bad Tutor
programme.desc: (M) Single-mom Karen is focused on getting daughter Emily graduated and off to college. But when she hires Devin to boost Emily's grades, the tutor becomes obsessed.

programme.title: Romantic Rewrite
programme.desc: LMN provides drama movies, thrillers, and suspense-filled stories focused on relationships, crime, and real-life inspired events.
